rationale: No qualitative change this cycle — Iran deal remains unresolved (continuation), Ukraine hits Russian energy infrastructure (minor positive for Ukraine but background noise for Poland), and EU migration debate continues at low relevance.

top_events.title: US-Iran deal: Trump says Sunday signing, Tehran contradicts
top_events.summary: Deal remains unresolved — if signed, oil prices could drop, easing energy costs for Polish households and industry. Continued uncertainty keeps energy markets volatile.

top_events.title: Ukraine strikes Russian energy terminal
top_events.summary: Ukraine continues targeting Russian energy infrastructure, signaling ongoing war without qualitative escalation. No direct impact on Poland beyond background war continuation.

top_events.title: EU migration rules debate intensifies
top_events.summary: Rival migration marches in Rome and EU-wide debate on new migration rules touch on Poland's ongoing sensitivity to migration pressure and EU policy direction.
